title: AI Startup Strategic Repositioning
context: An early-stage AI startup specializing in automated image processing faced difficulty gaining traction in a saturated market. They lacked clear differentiation, a focused vertical, and a structured go-to-market strategy.
problem: The company operated in a highly competitive AI infrastructure market without clear differentiation or a defined target vertical — making investor conversations and customer acquisition inefficient.
actions: Conducted structured market and competitive analysis using SWOT and Porter's 5 Forces
Assessed demand potential and competitive intensity across 5 high-value industry verticals
Developed a disruptive repositioning strategy focused on Vertical AI specialization
Designed a phased 6-month go-to-market and implementation roadmap with clear KPIs
Presented findings and strategic recommendations to the founding team and CEO
myContribution: Led the market analysis and strategic framework development. Responsible for the competitive benchmarking, vertical scoring matrix, and the final repositioning strategy document.
result: Strategy acknowledged by the CEO as a viable growth direction for Series A funding. Company reframed positioning toward Vertical AI specialization, improving messaging clarity and investor narrative.

title: Digify Active: B2B Growth Marketing Agency
context: Digify Active was a B2B performance marketing agency concept built as part of an applied MSc project. The target clients were small and medium fitness businesses in Europe lacking structured digital marketing systems.
problem: SME fitness businesses had no structured approach to digital marketing measurement — operating without clear KPIs, defined conversion funnels, or data-driven budget allocation.
actions: Conducted primary market research and defined the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) for the agency
Designed conversion-focused landing pages in HubSpot with A/B test framework
Launched and optimized Google Ads campaigns focused on lead generation for fitness SMEs
Defined KPI measurement framework: CTR, CPC, lead conversion rate, and CPA
Analyzed campaign performance data and built optimization recommendations based on findings
myContribution: Responsible for ICP definition, Google Ads campaign strategy and setup, HubSpot landing page architecture, and the performance analytics framework. Led the data analysis and reporting layer.
result: Identified top-performing channels with 15% lower projected CPA compared to industry benchmarks. Delivered a data-backed optimization playbook. Validated the agency model as viable for the target segment.

title: Oblicuo Hi-Fi Bar: Growth & Positioning Strategy
context: Oblicuo is a niche hi-fi listening bar in Barcelona targeting a specific audiophile and music enthusiast audience. Despite strong core product appeal, the business struggled with low weekday attendance and lacked a defined digital strategy to grow awareness and loyalty.
problem: Inconsistent weekday attendance (Tuesday–Thursday) and no structured digital or content strategy for reaching and retaining niche music-focused audiences in a competitive Barcelona nightlife market.
actions: Conducted 16 in-depth qualitative customer interviews to map motivations, barriers, and triggers
Developed 3 detailed customer personas with behavioral, psychographic, and media data
Built a structured KPI framework for social media growth, event attendance tracking, and content performance
Analyzed competitor social presence, positioning, and share-of-voice in the Barcelona nightlife/culture space
Delivered a 6-month strategic plan covering content calendar, event strategy, and audience acquisition
myContribution: Led the customer research design and interview execution (16 interviews). Responsible for persona development, KPI framework design, and the final strategic document and presentation.
result: Delivered a clearly defined target segment and a 6-month strategic plan grounded in real customer insights. Client received a structured, data-informed roadmap for digital growth and event programming.
